brotaiPlatform.title: Brotaí Platform
brotaiPlatform.shortDescription: A digital platform designed to simplify access to information, applications, attendance management, and administrative processes for the Brotaí program.
brotaiPlatform.fullDescription: I am part of the collaborative development of a digital platform for Brotaí, a social program run by the City of Niterói that provides free cultural and technical education to local residents. The solution brings together dedicated workflows for participants, instructors, and administrators, centralizing information, applications, classes, attendance records, and administrative activities. My main contribution is focused on front-end development, with additional involvement in back-end development and data modeling.
brotaiPlatform.skills: UX/UI Design, Front-End Development, Figma, React, JavaScript, Node.js, Prisma ORM, SQLite
brotaiPlatform.process: The process began with requirements gathering and the mapping of user profiles, workflows, business rules, and data requirements. The team defined the platform’s features and data model, created responsive interfaces for participants, instructors, and administrators, and integrated the front end with the back end while continuously testing and refining the main workflows.
brotaiPlatform.result: The platform is currently under development and already brings the program’s essential workflows together in a centralized solution. The project is now undergoing validation, refinement, and preparation for deployment.

websiteEkovitra.title: Ekovitra Website
websiteEkovitra.shortDescription: A responsive corporate website designed to showcase sustainable construction solutions and strengthen the company’s digital presence.
websiteEkovitra.fullDescription: I designed and developed the corporate website for Ekovitra, a sustainable construction company based in Manaus, Brazil. The main challenge was to transform technical information about its construction system into a clear, trustworthy, and accessible experience aligned with the brand’s values of innovation and sustainability. My work covered the entire process, from content organization and page architecture to interface design and responsive front-end implementation.
websiteEkovitra.skills: Web Design, Front-End Development, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
websiteEkovitra.process: The process began with organizing the company’s information, developing an understanding of the sustainable construction industry, and analyzing visual and functional references. Based on this research, I defined the page hierarchy and navigation flows, developed the visual direction and responsive layouts, and implemented the interface with React and TypeScript for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
websiteEkovitra.result: The result was a modern, responsive corporate website that presents the company’s solutions clearly and strengthens its digital presence through a visual language aligned with innovation and sustainability.

memorioApp.title: Memório App
memorioApp.shortDescription: A digital journal app designed to help users record emotions, daily reflections, and meaningful memories in one place.
memorioApp.fullDescription: I developed the UX/UI project for Memório during the Digital Design program at FIAP. The goal was to create a digital journal that brought emotional records, personal reflections, and photographs together in a single space. The main challenge was to balance ease of use, clear information organization, and a visual language that conveyed warmth without compromising the clarity of the interface.
memorioApp.process: I researched journal and well-being applications, organized the main features, and defined the information architecture and key user flows. I then developed the visual identity, interface screens, and an interactive prototype in Figma, prioritizing clear hierarchy, simple interactions, and consistency across the different types of entries.
memorioApp.result: The project resulted in a cohesive, interactive prototype that brings emotions, written reflections, and photographs together in an organized and emotionally supportive experience.

helenaDuarteWebsite.title: Helena Duarte Website
helenaDuarteWebsite.shortDescription: A fictional professional website combining editorial design and responsive development for a specialist in Corporate Law and Data Protection.
helenaDuarteWebsite.fullDescription: I created an end-to-end conceptual project for Helena Duarte, a fictional lawyer specializing in Corporate Law and Data Protection. The case study was developed to explore how content strategy, editorial design, and front-end development can work together to build a strong professional presence. The character, portrait, credentials, publications, events, and contact details were created exclusively for the concept.
helenaDuarteWebsite.skills: Web Design, Front-End Development, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
helenaDuarteWebsite.process: I defined the character’s professional positioning, organized the content strategy, and analyzed references from legal websites and editorial design projects. Based on this research, I developed the visual identity, typography, and responsive layouts before implementing the interface with React, TypeScript, and reusable components.
helenaDuarteWebsite.result: The result is a complete case study demonstrating the integration of content, visual identity, user experience, and front-end development in a consistent professional digital presence.

sensenGamesWebsite.title: Sensen Games Website
sensenGamesWebsite.shortDescription: An official, responsive, and bilingual website for a Brazilian indie game studio, created to introduce its games, story, and creative identity to a global audience.
sensenGamesWebsite.fullDescription: I contributed to the collaborative design and development of the official website for Sensen Games, a Brazilian indie game studio. The project was completed during the Bolsa Futuro Digital program, an initiative by Softex in partnership with Brazil’s Ministry of Education, as part of a React-focused Front-End Development course. The goal was to translate the studio’s creative identity into an engaging, responsive experience designed for both Portuguese- and English-speaking audiences.
sensenGamesWebsite.skills: UX/UI Design, Front-End Development, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, i18next, SEO, EmailJS
sensenGamesWebsite.process: The team aligned on the studio’s needs, defined the project scope, organized the content, and distributed responsibilities. I contributed to the creation and refinement of the responsive layouts and to the React implementation, including SPA navigation, internationalization with i18next, SEO optimization, and a contact form integrated with EmailJS.
sensenGamesWebsite.result: The project delivered an official, responsive, and bilingual website that brings together the studio’s story, games, and creative identity in a consistent digital experience developed collaboratively.

natPlusChatbot.title: Nat+ Chatbot
natPlusChatbot.shortDescription: An AI-powered beauty assistant concept designed to make product recommendations more personalized, approachable, and relevant.
natPlusChatbot.fullDescription: As part of a team, I developed Nat+, a conversational AI concept created for the FIAP Challenge 2025 in partnership with Natura. The proposal was to evolve the brand’s existing virtual assistant from a primarily operational tool into a digital beauty consultant capable of understanding users’ preferences, routines, and goals. My contribution focused on UX/UI Design, interaction flows, and the functional prototyping of the chatbot.
natPlusChatbot.process: We analyzed the beauty and skincare customer journey and identified opportunities for personalization. We then mapped usage scenarios and conversational flows, designed the chatbot’s interfaces and interactions in Figma, and implemented a functional prototype in GPTMaker to validate the concept in practice.
natPlusChatbot.result: The result was a functional prototype demonstrating how artificial intelligence, personalization, and conversational design can make product discovery more relevant and engaging.
